positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast linocut style illustration featuring stylized woodland creatures (like foxes, owls, and deer) intertwined with celestial elements (crescent moons, stars, and nebulas). The composition must be centered, highly legible, and defined by clean, solid silhouettes and sharp outlines, optimized for apparel printing. Use a rich, limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and cosmic gold, contrasted sharply against an off-white background. Incorporate intricate botanical detailing (mandrake roots, stylized leaves) to fill the space, giving a mystical, ancient, yet modern aesthetic. Art style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets linocut printmaking.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, low contrast, grayscale, jpeg artifacts, dirty, messy
